raw_consumer_statement:
XXXXSubject: Appeal for Denied Dispute  Unauthorized Charge for Undelivered Services XXXXTo Whom It May Concern,

I am writing to formally appeal the denial of my dispute submitted on XXXX XXXX XXXX regarding a $XXXX charge made to my Citi credit card by XXXX  for a XXXX XXXX XXXX. I respectfully request that my case be reconsidered for the following reasons:

I signed up for XXXX XXXX through XXXX  and completed the $XXXX  payment in good faith, expecting to receive the advertised services. However, after payment, I was informed that XXXX XXXX does not prior auth Medicaid and that prior authorization was requiredinformation that was **not disclosed** before the transaction.

This essential restriction was only communicated **after** my card was charged, and as a result, I was unable to recieve the services I paid for . I contacted the merchant to request a refund, but they refused, even though I did not and could not get the benefits of  the service.

This is a clear example of a **material misrepresentation or omission** of important service terms, which makes the charge unauthorized under the Fair Credit Billing Act. The merchants refusal to refund a charge for services that were never delivered or made accessible is both unreasonable and unjust.

I am asking Citi to reconsider this case and help recover the \XXXX that was wrongfully charged to my account. I appreciate your time and assistance in resolving this matter.

Sincerely,XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
